productDisplayName: Nike Men Football Soccer Black Jacket
description: Composition Reversible jacket from nike – either all black or red with black lower body Quilted jacket made of 100% polyester, has a front zipper, zipped hand-warmer pockets, zipped internal pocket, two internal pockets with press studs, lightly padded hood, slim slightly stretchy band on the hood opening, cuffs and hem, has Thermore Rinnova thermal insulation, jacket is filled with lightweight 100% recycled high performance PET fibres, and nike swoosh with manchester united badge printed in red and black on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold seperately Do not use softeners Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach; Do not dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron over design This jacket is perfect for any situation. Whether you want to blend in with sober black, or be hi-vis in bold red, this reversible jacket will meet your need. The high-tech insulation is lightweight making this a great jacket for warmer climates rather than the deepest winter. Throw it on over your jeans and T-shirt to keep out the evening chill, or use it while training in cooler weather. Lots of internal pockets make this a practical choice. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 6', chest 39" shoulders 18"
